caption: 两像素也不行。
scene: Sage sitting alone at a desk late at night, leaning very close to a single monitor showing two rectangle shapes with a tiny gap between them and a small dotted measurement line reading 2, one paw on a mechanical keyboard, a small crescent moon in a window behind, a flat focused line for a mouth.
bible_hook: §2 Sage pixel-pushes at 11pm before a review because the spacing was 2px off and it bothered him
rationale: Recent Sage work posts covered crit, standup, and the Friday scope-add, but not the solitary late-night 2px obsession — a quieter design-craft pressure moment, no props repeated from the last 30 days.
